reviews.comment:
Pare a desayunar nada más y salí con dos Sandwichs gigantes pan pebete, uno de jamón crudo, queso y manteca, el otro matambre casero y queso, almorzamos y cenamos con los dos que habíamos comprado.... Hermano..... Que pedazo de sanguche.... No podes pasar por ahí sin llevarte uno aunque sea. Las medialunas también riquísimas... A la tarde no hay más sanguchitos......

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for breakfast and came out with two giant sandwiches made with pebete bread: one with raw ham, cheese, and butter, and the other with homemade matambre and cheese. We had lunch and dinner with the two we had bought. Man, what a great sandwich. You can't pass by without taking one, at least. The croissants are also delicious. In the afternoon, there are no more sandwiches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMDRURHlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación para realizar una parada en la ruta y comer un sándwich, los mismos son gigantescos y de excelente calidad a un precio más que módicos. Está calidad y cantidad gana por sobre las instalaciones que resultan poco atractivas y un tanto chicas. RECOMIENDO

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop for a road trip and a sandwich. They're huge, excellent quality, and very reasonably priced. The quality and quantity more than make up for the rather unattractive and small facilities. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

reviews.comment:
Un lugar HERMOSO, ya quedan muy pocos de los viejos para dores del A C A,  buena arboleda, con mesas y parrillas, excelente el bar y SUPER RECOMENDABLES los famosos sándwiches de crudo y queso !!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
A BEAUTIFUL place, there are very few of the old paradors of the ACA left, good trees, with tables and grills, excellent bar and HIGHLY RECOMMENDED the famous raw and cheese sandwiches!!!!!!

reviews.comment:
Lugar súper poblado siempre, ricos sandwiches pésimos los baños. Sucios, precarios, no condicen con el flujo de gente que reciben. Cero mantenimiento.

(Translated by Google)
Always super crowded, great sandwiches, terrible bathrooms. Dirty, run-down, and not up to par with the number of people they serve. Zero maintenance.

reviews.comment:
